reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: It is not a good college for placements.

review_content.Placements: Our college doesn't provide placements. They provide some internships offers but not for all the students. Remaining students have to arrange internships and jobs on their own. Do not opt for this college if you are looking for placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college was average. Classrooms and academics things were good, but the overall experience lacks somewhere. The food served in the canteen was good. Sports equipment is available, and the gardens are good enough for students interested in sports.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: Good faculty. Poor placements.

review_content.Placements: Placements are not provided as such. Approximately nobody gets placed in B.Com at least. So the placement percentage is 0. But the management is trying to get good companies on campus. So if they succeed, the college will have good companies coming because it is a reputed college.
review_content.Infrastructure: No hostel is provided to stay. Students have to manage on their own. The library is big enough and has all the necessary books. There is no college canteen and there are more than 300 classrooms. The college is built on more than 60 acres of land and has a ground which is used for various sports.

college_info.college_name: Keystone Group of Institutions: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the Keystone Group of Institutions:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Keystone Group of Institutions offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Keystone Group of Institutions offers M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. The fees for Keystone Group of Institutions courses range between INR 66,000 to 2,81,384.

review_content.Infrastructure: No Wi-Fi available there for students. We used to browse by computer in computer lab. Better labs for us. Good hostel with mouthwatering food. We had a big play ground and out of our 8 lectures we had one lecture for sports and one for library. We had a variety of play ground like football, basketball, cricket, badminton table tennis, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with my college because of the good education they are provide.

review_content.Placements: A lot of companies visit our college. We have a lot of good jobs provided by the college like technical work in engineering companies. They take a lot of good students for Placement. The selection was tough because they are 3 rounds of selection. The first round is for written test. The second is for group discussion round. The third is for the personal interview. Tose who pass the three rounds are provided with the offer letter.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is pretty good. There are good classrooms, labs, and they are very clean. We have a sound proof library and medical facilities are also available. They provide all the sports equipment from cricket to carrom. All the activities are done very well there. The canteen food is good for health but they also provide mess food. The hostel rooms are good and clean. I didn't face any infrastructure related issues during my tenure at the college. In every 3 months, they arrange sports weeks for students who are interested in sports and they provide one separate lecture for sports.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: Review

review_content.Other: It has good environment and good staff. Classes are good and staff members also behave friendly. This is the best college for engineering and MBA also. The campus is also very good and student behavior is also impressive and all things are good. This is a co-ed college. It is a great college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: Review

review_content.Other: Keystone group of institution's name speaks for itself. College hosts three fests and there’s a choice of clubs & activities for all round development. Attendance is strict. Academically, if you manage your time well, you can do well. Teachers are good but not great. Students are extremely friendly. There are many places to relax. Films are screened occasionally in the auditorium. Being a centrally funded institute, college fees is lower than all comparable institutes. College is good as we compared to faculty members, atmosphere, and it is RTU, kota based college is good as we compared to faculty members ,atmosphere, and it is RTU,kota based.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Ambal Professional Group of Institutions offers a wide range of programmes at both UG and PG levels. With option for Full Time learning, students can choose from several streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG stage, courses available include B.E. / B.Tech. For the PG level, there is a wide range of courses like M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Ambal Professional Group of Institutions fee structure ranges between INR 35,000 to 2,00,000.

faqs.answer:
A:    Ambal Professional Group of Institutions has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityMBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor's degree of minimum 3 years duration with minimum 50% (45 % for reserved category).
The qualifying degree examination can be 10+2+3/4/5 years pattern or 10+3 years Diploma +3 years pattern or B.E./B.Tech./B.Arch./B.Pharm. or 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE.
AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.
Candidates admitted through Lateral Entry in degree courses are not eligible.
Candidates with degree obtained without studying 10th/12th Std. or 3 years degree programme are not eligible.
Candidates appearing for the final semester/year are also eligible.B.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced.
faqs.question: How can I get into Ambal Professional Group of Institutions for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?

faqs.answer: A:    Ambal Professional Group of Institutions offers Degree and Diploma courses including 5 UG and 5 PG courses. Additionally, it also has After 10th Diploma courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Ambal Professional Group of Institutions has specializations such as M.E./M.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Construction Engineering, VLSI Design, B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, After 10th Diploma specializations in Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering.
faqs.question: Which major specializations are available at Ambal Professional Group of Institutions?

faqs.answer: A:    The overall seats available across all courses offered by Ambal Professional Group of Institutions is up to 540. Good thing to know is that Ambal Professional Group of Institutions has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE.

Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses

highlights.summary: The TANCET 2026 application form will be live from Mar 16, 2026, to Apr 10, 2026, for San Group of Institutions admission to the MBA course. Also, the TANCET exam 2026 is scheduled for May 9, 2026.

college_info.intro: San Group of Institutions provides courses like MBA, BBA, BSc, BCom, BCA and MCA. Admission to all the programmes is completely merit-based. To be eligible for admission, candidates must fill out the course-wise eligibility set by the college. The basic eligibility set by the college for admission to UG courses is to pass Class 10 and Class 12, for PG courses, pass graduation degree, and for PhD courses, pass a master's degree for admission.

faqs.answer: A:    No, there is no entrance exam required to get admission to San Group of Institutions in any courses. Admission is merit-based at this college. Students are required to apply on the official website to fill out the admission forms online. Once the process is finished, the final seat allocation is based on the last qualifying exam scores.
faqs.question: Is there an entrance exam for admission to San Group of Institutions?

faqs.answer: A:    The eligibility criteria for MBA is that candidates must have a graduation degree. After meeting the eligibility criteria, candidates must simply apply online on the official website of San Group of Institutions for admission.
faqs.question: What are the eligibility criteria for MBA at San Group of Institutions?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Visual Communication - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: I wouldn't recommend anyone to join here.

review_content.Placements: There is no placement cell, and neither placements nor internships are offered. If you have money, then you can get a degree. None of the students got placements in any course. The college hasn't been in touch with recruiters nor any companies. There is not enough source for them to give placements to students. Students have to search for an internship on their own as the college or management does not take care of those things.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi and basic facilities to accommodate students are not available here. Basic benches and desks were lacking in the classrooms. If it's a rainy season, water flows through the floor. For unnecessary things, they charge fine upon students. There are no proper labs and equipment for students to do practicals. Quality of mess and canteen food was worse and not hygiene. The infrastructure of our college is attached to nature, and because of that, wild animals are entering the campus and classrooms. It is not safe to keep things in classes, and the monkey may take things from classrooms.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Microbiology - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college for studies with strict rules and regulations.

review_content.Placements: Almost 60-70% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary offered was Rs. 15,000 per month, and the lowest salary offered was Rs. 8,000 per month. We are studying laboratory analysis, and it has more opportunities abroad.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our classrooms are huge. All facilities are available. Laboratory facilities are available for practicals. The library is clean and it has many books.
review_content.Faculty: Our teachers are friendly, qualified, and knowledgeable. The teaching quality is good. The course makes students industry-ready. Semester exams are difficult.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Good campus. Great atmosphere those who are looking for better .

content.Placements: Placement percentage are above 90 and top companies are hiring candidate through placements. Companies like hcl, and wipro come for placement. 50% students get internship. For a B.Sc. . computer Science and BCA as well as B.Sc. . information technology graduate can easily aim for software developer related jobs.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi enabled campus and eco friendly infrastructure, premium library and labs. Neat hostel & canteen. Hostel available for both means and women's separately, hostel also having separate Wi-Fi connection and tv, gym also playing facilities. 3 time food also including.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Visual Communication - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: I wouldn't recommend anyone to join here.

content.Placements: There is no placement cell, and neither placements nor internships are offered. If you have money, then you can get a degree. None of the students got placements in any course. The college hasn't been in touch with recruiters nor any companies. There is not enough source for them to give placements to students. Students have to search for an internship on their own as the college or management does not take care of those things.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi and basic facilities to accommodate students are not available here. Basic benches and desks were lacking in the classrooms. If it's a rainy season, water flows through the floor. For unnecessary things, they charge fine upon students. There are no proper labs and equipment for students to do practicals. Quality of mess and canteen food was worse and not hygiene. The infrastructure of our college is attached to nature, and because of that, wild animals are entering the campus and classrooms. It is not safe to keep things in classes, and the monkey may take things from classrooms.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Microbiology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college for studies with strict rules and regulations.

content.Placements: Almost 60-70% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary offered was Rs. 15,000 per month, and the lowest salary offered was Rs. 8,000 per month. We are studying laboratory analysis, and it has more opportunities abroad.
content.Infrastructure: Our classrooms are huge. All facilities are available. Laboratory facilities are available for practicals. The library is clean and it has many books.
content.Faculty: Our teachers are friendly, qualified, and knowledgeable. The teaching quality is good. The course makes students industry-ready. Semester exams are difficult.

Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis. Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana. Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023). There is no upper age limit.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks for BC categories. Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible. Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB. Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream of engineering and technology with the above-mentioned minimum percentage (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from AICTE/UGC approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto. Preference will be given to candidates qualified GATE in the relevant branch based on their test scores and the remaining seats will be for candidates qualified in APPGECET as per their merit ranks

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Totally dissatisfied because of management.

content.Placements: The College was closed by the management as no placements were provided. They charge a lot of fee from the students and in return, they don't provide proper learning and placements. The worst management is there. We don't have proper knowledge of the subjects we are studying. As there were no placements, no roles were offered in our courses.
content.Infrastructure: This college has the the worst management and chairman. They closed the college without any prior information. We were on the roads as they didn't provide any other college to study. Though, the facilities and infrastructure are available for our course. Worst canteen, no proper food was provided for hostlers, no sports, no medical camps and no games were there.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I don't recommend this college for B.Tech as it ruins your future.

content.Placements: There is no scope for campus placements in our Viswanatha Institute of Technology and Management. There is no placement training in our college. In this college, there are very few faculty who will teach us about campus placements. Every year, only 30% of students get selected on campus with 3-5 LPA packages.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of VITAM college is good enough as an engineering college. There are no Wi-Fi facilities on campus. The hostel is very dirty with no proper facilities. The classrooms are good with enough space. Labs and library are good, and food in the canteen is very bad with high prices. They encourage sports well.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with our faculty and satisfied with our placements .

content.Placements: Even though I am an mechanical student our college provides good campus placements for our branch with several top companies. The highest package offer is 4 LPA the lowest package is 2.5 LPA They offers us Graduate trainess Top recruit company are tata, tech mahindra .
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms of our college were pretty decent. Labs are most satisfied I our college. In our district my college has one of the top college should have all labs. Hostel facility was nice and food was decent for reasonable price They encourage in sports also. We participate in Zonal .

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Review of Viswanadha Institute of Technology and Management.

content.Placements: Almost 75% of the students are placed in our course. The highest salary package offered is 11 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 2.75 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our college are TCS, Cognizant, Capgemini, and Zespay. Around 20% of the students are placed in internships of Hero Motors company mainly the mechanical engineering students. Roles offered in our course are team manager, developer, and business development executive.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good and situated around trees. They have 24 hrs Wi-Fi available in the library and the classrooms are very vast and very suitable for more number of students. We have a digital library which consists of a lot of computers and Wi-Fi is also available which helps in studying various books on the internet. The hostel is situated beside the campus which has delicious food and mess facilities and a medical room for medical emergencies. We have a vast ground in the college and an indoor stadium.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Overall, it is an average college.

content.Placements: The CSE course has about 12 students. Our college does not provide placements. About 2 students got the personal internship. Roles are not offered to the students.
content.Infrastructure: It is a good college with a good infrastructure.
content.Faculty: Faculty members in our college are knowledgeable. The course curriculum is relevant. The pass percentage is 70%.
content.Other: I have chosen this course because I am interested in the computer science course. Events and fests organised at our college are low.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in Viswanadha Institute of Technology and Management for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer:
Viswanadha Institute of Technology and Management has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognized as equivalent there to, from a recognized Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible.
Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis.
Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana.
Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023).
There is no upper age limit.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute.
45% marks for BC categories.
Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible.

Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joi

reviews.review_heading: Totally dissatisfied because of management.
reviews.review_text: This college has the the worst management and chairman. They closed the college without any prior information. We were on the roads as they didn't provide any other college to study.  Though, the facilities and infrastructure are available for our course. Worst canteen, no proper food was provided for hostlers, no sports, no medical camps and no games were there.

reviews.review_heading: I don't recommend this college for B.Tech as it ruins your future.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of VITAM college is good enough as an engineering college. There are no Wi-Fi facilities on campus. The hostel is very dirty with no proper facilities. The classrooms are good with enough space. Labs and library are good, and food in the canteen is very bad with high prices. They encourage sports well.

They encourage in sports also. We participate in Zonal .

reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good and situated around trees. We have a digital library which consists of a lot of computers and Wi-Fi is also available which helps in studying various books on the internet. The hostel is situated beside the campus which has delicious food and mess facilities and a medical room for medical emergencies. We have a vast ground in th...

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is an average college.
reviews.review_text: It is a good college with a good infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Viswanadha Institute of Technology and Management.
reviews.review_text: Our institute had 24 hours free Wi-Fi facilities which was provided by our college management. We had labs named chemistry lab, computer labs, and mechanical labs. Classrooms were huge consisting of 45 students at a time. We had a huge library and a large volume of books. The quality of mess food was good and hostel rooms were also good. Playground and medical facilities were also available.

reviews.review_heading: The college has very good environment and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is amazing, and it is very well-organised. The classrooms are well-equipped with central AC systems and necessary amenities like smart boards and a stapbend system. The college also has a cricket ground and other facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The college is simple and very beautiful.
reviews.review_text: We are highly satisfied to have such a good environment which is located in Mindivanipalem village near Sontyam.  Our college has Wi-Fi connectivity with 10 MB per second. Lab maintenance was very good, and the interior of the classrooms was excellent. The library track was good for learning. Hostel food was average rated, but medical facilities were good. There was sports maintenance like a tennis court and volleyball court, and we have a cricket ground.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college with high standards, infrastructure, labs and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The quality of the food served was very excellent in our hostel. Mainly the library and laboratories were also good, and the cricket ground was good and with greenery around. Medical facilities were also very good. Even the classrooms were very good with benches and fans.

reviews.review_heading: Viswanadha Institute of Technology and Management is one of the best for the mechanical course.
reviews.review_text: Our college is good for labs. Labs are well-equipped. Even in practicals time, surrounding colleges come to our college for using our labs. Classrooms are also very good. Wi-Fi facility is also available for study purposes only. Library facility is also available with all subject books. The hostel facility is also available in our college. Canteen is also available, and the food served is at low cost. Our college also provides a playground and indoor stadium for playing games. Medical facilities...

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of this college is good. There is no problem regarding labs, classroom and library. There are a lot of books available in library. Labs are perfect but there are net issues sometimes. There is an availability of hostel for both boys and girls which is certainly good but the food in mess is not good. This college also has facility of medical rooms, centralised AC auditorium.

reviews.review_heading: The worst college. Placements are null.
reviews.review_text: No Wi-Fi, Labs are under equipped. Hostel facilities are also not so great. Just minimum facilities are provided. Canteen food quality is just average. Sports and games are just fine but not so great to provide good opportunities. It would be better if Inter college fests or events are planned more.

reviews.review_heading: It is an all-rounder college, and faculty shortage is a huge let down.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is the best. There is no shortage of labs and the library. There is a medical room available for any emergency. Food served in the canteen is awkwardly bad and hard to digest. Hostels are better when compared to food.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good atmosphere and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Labs here are very good, and the library also good. Classrooms are very peaceful because our college is very far from the road and is surrounded by hills. The canteen is much better, and there is no hostel. The medical room is available for 24 hours. Sports events are conducted yearly, and tournaments are also conducted during fests.

reviews.review_heading: I would suggest preferring for colleges like ANITs.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very bad, and I have never experienced this type of infrastructure in any college. Food served in our college is average but not excellent. I think the hostel facility is also not good, but it is average. The environment is superb.

highlights.summary: The registration deadline for AP EAPCET 2026 (without a late fee) has been extended to Mar 17, 2026, for Dr.K.V. Subba Reddy College Of Engineering For Women (KVSW) admission to BTech and BPharma courses. The BTech exams are scheduled for May 12 to May 15, and on May 18, 2026, followed by the BPharma exam on May 19 and May 20, 2026.

top_recruiters: CGI Information Systems and Management Consultants

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, Dr.K.V. Subba Reddy College Of Engineering For Women (KVSW) offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from streams like Engineering and Business & Management Studies. College offers B.E. / B.Tech courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. The Dr.K.V. Subba Reddy College Of Engineering For Women (KVSW) course fee ranges between INR 70,000 to 1,68,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Dr.K.V. Subba Reddy College Of Engineering For Women (KVSW) has courses such as B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, M.E./M.Tech which are primarily in the stream of Engineering, Business & Management Studies. Dr.K.V. Subba Reddy College Of Engineering For Women (KVSW) has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Civil Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Electronics Engineering, Electrical Engineering.

Many companies visit our college, and the highest salary package offered in our college is around 3 LPA to 5 LPA. Overall, about 80% of the students did an internship course. DR.K.V. Subba Reddy Women Engineering College is a good place to explore our future.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: The college has very good and friendly faculty, and the study environment is good.

content.Placements: The placements do not depend on the percentage. It depends on the knowledge and coding skills of students. The highest salary offered is 30,000 per month, and the lowest salary is 15,000 per month. Internships are provided.
content.Infrastructure: Good hostel facilities are available in college. The hostel rooms are clean, well-ventilated with attached and non-attached bathroom facilities. The hostel mess provides breakfast, lunch, snacks and dinner. Hot water facilities are provided.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It has a nice faculty and teaching.

content.Placements: There is no high-valued company placement, moderate or local companies are coming to allow working in their company. As a student of civil engineering, B.Tech, we got the opportunity to work in the architecture and construction site field for learning the skill.
content.Infrastructure: Course and building facilities are good. Hostel buildings are separated, and boys' and girls' hostels are separated. The library is full of a very calm environment and comfortable, There are many useful books for study in the library. The staff of the college is also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: It is a good place for students to develop their career.

content.Placements: Almost 85% of students were placed. Around 30-40 companies visit for campusing and hired students. In every department, almost 80-90% of students got good placements. They make students' jobs ready by encouraging and helping them. I got placed in 2 companies so the placements cell was good. Almost 90% of students were placed in our college. The average salary package offered was 3.5 LPA, and all students were well trained by the placements cell to understand basic aptitude tests, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was good in this college. It provides Wi-Fi services and a library was available with several books. There was a mess, canteen, and a maggi hotspot for food facility, and all had good food with proper hygiene.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Overall atmosphere is motivational.

content.Placements: The placements of our college are good. Our placement cell is working hard to place students in great companies. For more details, you can check our college website as all the information is available there in detail. The companies comes for the placements are not so good. Packages are average for an MBA degree holder. 4-5 LPA is the average package they provide. The institute needs to develop their criteria for the placement.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. The campus is clean and gives good vibes. Along with that, mock court, library, video editing room, etc. , are available. For students, the canteen is also important, so the good thing is the canteen is also great.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am not so satisfied with placements.

content.Placements: There is no placement in college for civil engineering at 2021-2022. There is no student placed in any placement due to pandemic. There is no companies recruitment for our college. In last years there is some placement from call center in which last year students are eligible.
content.Infrastructure: The building of college is very well structured and have all facilities in campus like labs, classroom, ventilation system, cooling system, canteen, mess etc. There is ground for sports like badminton ground, kabadi ground. Food facilities also available in hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with the faculty members, infrastructure and facilities of the college.

content.Placements: There were about 80 to 85 students got placed in our course. The highest salary package offered was 7.8 LPA and the lowest salary package was 3.5 LPA. Many companies recruited the students from our course. The top recruited companies are Google and TCS. Most of the students were not interested in internships. We got the opportunity to be a coordinator on engineer's day.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities that were provided to us were absolutely good. Students were provided with high-speed data, the classrooms and labs were fully air-conditioned and the library was also good. The food quality in mess or canteen was also good and all the students were satisfied with it. Medical facilities were also available for all the students and sports tournaments like cricket, badminton, and volleyball were held every year.

hostel_campus.college_name: Surendera Group of Institutions Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: It has a nice faculty and teaching.
reviews.review_text: Course and building facilities are good. Hostel buildings are separated, and boys' and girls' hostels are separated. The library is full of a very calm environment and comfortable, There are many useful books for study in the library. The staff of the college is also good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good place for students to develop their career.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was good in this college. It provides Wi-Fi services and a library was available with several books. There was a mess, canteen, and a maggi hotspot for food facility, and all had good food with proper hygiene.

reviews.review_heading: Overall atmosphere is motivational.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. The campus is clean and gives good vibes. Along with that, mock court, library, video editing room, etc. , are available. For students, the canteen is also important, so the good thing is the canteen is also great.

reviews.review_heading: I am not so satisfied with placements.
reviews.review_text: The building of college is very well structured and have all facilities in campus like labs, classroom, ventilation system, cooling system, canteen, mess etc. There is ground for sports like badminton ground, kabadi ground. Food facilities also available in hostel.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with the faculty members, infrastructure and facilities of the college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities that were provided to us were absolutely good. Students were provided with high-speed data, the classrooms and labs were fully air-conditioned and the library was also good. The food quality in mess or canteen was also good and all the students were satisfied with it. Medical facilities were also available for all the students and sports tournaments like cricket, badminton, and volleyball were held every year.

reviews.review_heading: Overview of Surendera group of institutions.
reviews.review_text:
1. Facilities were quite average. 
2. College did have labs, classrooms and library of decent quality. 
3. Internet connection was a headache. 
4. Hostel people can provide more details for the food quality. 
5 There was a hospital just opposite to our college or we can say "in the same building " for medical emergencies.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are good, but the placement opportunities are not provided.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. We have very attractive buildings for every department. There are good pathways between different buildings. The university has good classrooms, laboratories, libraries, and a sports ground, but it has a small canteen which is the negative part of the college. The campus has natural greenery and a clean environment.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, infrastructure is good but there are no placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the institution is very good. It has attractive sky high building and natural greenery. There is a good parking space. The classrooms are huge with natural light. There are air-conditioned computer laboratories, fully equipped workshops and a good library available. There is a volleyball net to play. The palm trees enhance the beauty of premises.

reviews.review_heading: An amazing experience for studies here.
reviews.review_text: Talking about the campus, it won't be very hard to describe the campus and the facilities here. The campus is so beautifully and elegantly designed that you won't be missing your home at all  The living environment here is so comfy and near to nature. The infrastructure is greatly developed and you won't have any hard experience here.the campus is also so close to the city that you will be getting each and everything of your requirement very easily.

faqs.answer: A:    The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.
faqs.question: What is the average BTech Computer Science Engineering salary in India?

faqs.answer: A:    The salary for an entry-level job is INR 30,000 to 45,000 and above per month. ECE graduates earn well after gathering experience for one-two year. Moreover, professionals with industrial experience stand out in terms of skills and can earn INR 8-12 Lacs per annum. To get good salary, ECE graduates should have a clear concept of designing, Analog circuit, VLSI, Microprocessors, Antennas, Network Analysis, and Programming.

faqs.answer: The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.Some job profiles are listed here:Brand ManagerAccount ManagerInternational Business ManagerMarketing ExecutiveBusiness Technical ConsultantAll the best.
faqs.question: Q: What is the scope of MBA?

faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field. Helpful Link: Mechanical Engineering Subjects in Detail
faqs.question: Q: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?

faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses
faqs.question: Q: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?

faqs.answer: Dear candidate, the subject of Machine Design basically teaches you about the designing fundamentals of various types of machinery across industries. You get to learn about the different ways in which elements can be combined to form an equipment or machine system and get the work done in an effective manner.The knowledge of this subject is very important for a mechanical engineer as he/she will have to put this to use in the future whenever they enter the workforce as a mechanical engineering professional.Hope this cleared your doubt. Have a good day.

review_summary.college_name: Naraina College of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good college for engineering and good placements.

content.Placements: In my college, the placement rate is about 60–70%. The highest package offered was 5 lakhs per year, and the lowest was 2 lakhs and the average package offered was 2.5 to 3 lakhs annually. The top recruiting companies are RSPL Ltd., Oppo, and Riding Engineering pvt. Ltd. Around 60% of students got internships in mechanical engineering diplomas. The top roles offered were assistant engineer and quality head.
content.Infrastructure: The college campus of Naraina groups was very good, neat, and clean. Free Wi-Fi is available on college campuses and hostels. Our campus enforces a strict dress code. A smart classroom facility is also available. The library has a collection of all books related to the course, and every student got a library card to access books. Our hostel quality was very good. Strict security protocol is there for all hostel students. Mess is provided for all hostelers. Pick-up and drop-off facility from hostel to college are free of charge for hostel student. A canteen is available for all students. Medical facility is available for students in our Naraina Medical College and Hospital. Regular social activities and sports are also available.

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering (Manufacturing Engineering) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Review of Naraina College of Engineering and Technology.

content.Placements: About 60% of students were placed in our course. The highest salary package offered in our college was 30 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 10 LPA. Top recruiting companies were TCS, Wipro, Infosys, etc. About 90% of students got internships from our course. Top roles offered in our course were engineer and HR.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility was available in our college. Labs were so good with equipment. Classrooms were also very good. Libraries had good books in our college. Hostels were so good in our college.
content.Faculty: Teachers were so good in our college. They had great knowledge of their fields. There were many curriculum activities in our college. Semester exams were not so tough. If you study from day one, you can get good marks in your semester exam. The pass percentage of semester exams was 30%.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: I am quite interested in mechanical engineering but this college was help allot.

content.Placements: Approximately 20% students were placed in that time. The salary was varied between15000 to 35000 for some students. In my college Daikin, tech Mahendra and many more companies were recruiting. Top role offered by the company Site Engineer and other post for many students. And also companies had provided salary between 2.2 Lacs to 3.8 Lacs per annum in my mechanical engineering course and average package was approximately 2.5 Lacs per annum. 68% percent of students GOT internship from my courses and GOT selected in many companies as for tech Mahindra, Daikin, hero cycle etc.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: NARAINA GROUP OF INSTITUTE : A Blend of Academics Excellence, Good Campus Life, and Career Growth.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2013
individual_reviews.title: This college is not up to the standard of engineering institutions in terms of facilities and labs.

content.Placements: The training and placement department quality is below average, and they don't work for the welfare of the students. The top recruiting company for our course is Lohia Group. The top role offered in our course is a graduate trainee. The highest salary package offered here was 3 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 1.5 LPA, and the average salary package offered was 2 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The quality of the facilities provided in the hostel building is good, and there is an attached washroom in every room. Hostel rooms have an accommodation capacity of 2 students, while some have 3 students also. The quality of the food served in the mess is below average. Medical facilities and sports facilities are fine. Canteen facilities were good.

faqs.question: What is the average BTech Computer Science Engineering salary in India?
faqs.answer: TheaverageBTech CSEsalary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

hostel_campus.college_name: Naraina College of Engineering and Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description:
Naraina College of Engineering and Technology's hostel has spacious, hygienic, well-ventilated and fully furnished rooms along with the LAN connectivity. The hostel also provides STD facility.
Single room accommodation is given to the final year and post graduate students. They are also permitted to use their own computers in their own rooms.

library.description: Naraina College of Engineering and Technology's library has a collection of over 55000 books, periodicals, national and international journals and CD-ROMs covering all aspects of academic studies and research material. The college library uses latest software like SAS, PROWESS, ORACLE etc. to enable work on data analysis, web technologies and software designing training grounds for building professionals.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for engineering and good placements.
reviews.review_text: The college campus of Naraina groups was very good, neat, and clean. Free Wi-Fi is available on college campuses and hostels. Our campus enforces a strict dress code. A smart classroom facility is also available. The library has a collection of all books related to the course, and every student got a library card to access books. Our hostel quality was very good. Strict security protocol is there for all hostel students. Mess is provided for all hostelers. Pick-up and drop-off facility from host...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Naraina College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility was available in our college. Labs were so good with equipment. Classrooms were also very good. Libraries had good books in our college. Hostels were so good in our college.

reviews.review_heading: I am quite interested in mechanical engineering but this college was help allot.
reviews.review_text: There are many more facilities present in the college as for free Wi-Fi, free labs and library etc. In my college ( Naraina college of engineering and technology). With comfortable classrooms. Teaching department was very good and classes run on time. The basic quality of the college is classes run on the time. In this college also present a sport ground for Play any types of games.

reviews.review_heading: NARAINA GROUP OF INSTITUTE : A Blend of Academics Excellence, Good Campus Life, and Career Growth.
reviews.review_text: Full campus is very clean and they also provide Wi-Fi. And there is a ground for outdoor games like Kabaddi, Kho-Kho as well as indoor games. There are separate hostel for boys and girls and all hostel rooms are well-equipped with the all basic need for students. All the labs, classrooms have ACs and smart board.

reviews.review_heading: This college is not up to the standard of engineering institutions in terms of facilities and labs.
reviews.review_text: The quality of the facilities provided in the hostel building is good, and there is an attached washroom in every room. Hostel rooms have an accommodation capacity of 2 students, while some have 3 students also. The quality of the food served in the mess is below average. Medical facilities and sports facilities are fine. Canteen facilities were good.

faqs.answer: Balaji Institute of Engineering and Management Studies has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognized as equivalent there to, from a recognized Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible. Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis. Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana. Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023). There is no upper age limit.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks for BC categories. Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible. Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB. Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.

paragraphs: SRM TRP Engineering College admissionis ongoing. The institute is a part of the famedSRM Group of Institutions. It offers BE/ BTech and ME courses affiliated withAnna Universityat UG and PG levels. These courses are offered across different specialisations.SRM TRP Engineering College admissionto both courses is based on AU and DOTE eligibility norms. For selection, the aspirant must fulfil the course-specific eligibility criteria. Admission atSRM TRP Engineering Collegein the second year of UG programmes is also offered.

Candidates seeking admission toUG & PG coursesat the institute are advised to check the eligibility criteria prescribed by the college for admission. The selection is done by the guidelines from AU and DOTE. Find below the eligibility details forSRM TRP Engineering College course admissions:

SRM TRP Engineering College admission criteriaare based on the guidelines of AICTE, the Government of Tamil Nadu, and Anna University. Candidates are advised to check the required educational qualifications before applying for admission. Details about the admission procedure are provided below:
STEP 1: SRM TRP Engineering College Application Process 2025

The college accepts applications via online mode. Hence, eligible students can visit the college's official website (apply.trp.srmtrichy.edu.in) to apply. All the details in the admission form should be filled out carefully. Candidates must enter correct contact details as further communication shall be done over mail/call.
STEP 2: Application Scanning & Selection
After the conclusion of the application process, the college scans the application and verifies the details. Selected candidates can be intimated over mail or call about selection.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation
Selected candidates further may have to submit the important documents and pay some amount of fee to confirm their seat.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for SRM TRP Engineering College?
faqs.answer: Eligibility criteria is the educational qualification required for a candidate to become eligible for admission. Below table carries eligibilty criteria for SRM TRP Engineering College courses:Course NameEligibility CriteriaBE/BTechClass 12 or equivalent exam pass withMathematics, Physics, andChemistrysubjects.MEBachelor's degree or equivalent exam pass in the relevant branch with a minimum of 50% aggregate

faqs.question: Can I get admission to SRM TRP Engineering College with 60% in Class 12th?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can get admission to SRM TRP Engineering College with 60% in Class 12th, but it will depend on the branch of engineering you want to study and the overall competition for seats in that particular year. SRM TRP Engineering College has a minimum eligibility requirement of 50% marks in aggregate in Mathematics, Physics, and Chemistry in Class 12th. But the fee may vary based on your Class 12th percentage.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for SRM TRP Engineering College?
faqs.answer: For admission at SRM TRP Engineering College, aspirants should meet the prescribed eligibility criteria. For BTech, it is a Class 12 pass with PCM subjects and for M.Tech - UG degree with at least 50% aggregate. Eligible students can visit the college website to fill out the admission form. The admission procedure is further carried out as per the guidelines of AICTE, Government of Tamil Nadu, and Anna University.

faqs.question: What are the courses offered at SRM TRP Engineering College?
faqs.answer: SRM TRP Engineering College offers undergraduate and postgraduate courses in the field of Engineering. The college offers BTech in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science and BE across five specialisations. It also offers ME course in Thermal Engineering and VLSI Design.The specialisations in which BE course is offered are:Civil EngineeringElectronics And Communication EngineeringElectrical And Electronics EngineeringComputer Science And EngineeringMechanical Engineering

placement_report.college_name: SRM TRP Engineering College Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: SRM TRP Engineering College Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: SRM TRP Engineering College has concluded its placement drive for the batch passing out in 2023. As per the latest report, the institute recorded 99% placement rate in the academic year 2022-2023. The participating recruiters placed 176 students of the institute in new-age job roles. The highest package and average package offered during SRM TRP Engineering College placements 2023 stood at INR 35 LPA and INR 4 LPA , respectively. The top recruiters of SRM TRP Engineering College in 2023 included TCS, Wipro, Mindtree, Zoho, K-Square, MU Sigma, Cognizant, Ashok Leyland , etc. Further, according to SRM TRP Engineering College NIRF report 2023, the median package offered during SRM TRP Engineering College BTech and MTech placements 2022 stood at INR 3.5 LPA and INR 3.25 LPA , respectively.

faqs.question: Does SRM TRP Engineering College have a placement cell?
faqs.answer: Yes, SRM TRP Engineering College has a placement cell that ensures placement assistance to every student. It is also responsible for conducting on-campus placement drives and organises a wide range of activities such as industry visits, live projects, workshops, guest lectures and seminars.

hostel_campus.college_name: SRM TRP Engineering College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Good college and satisfied with friends.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college is the best. Classrooms and Wi-Fi are available. We have common areas, and labs are excellent. We have a huge library, and many books are available. The facilities are good. I have studied in hostel for 3 years, and overall experience is good. The food is also good. The canteen is also available.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Hostel has good infrastructure and Wi-Fi facilities. It has a good infrastructure, and campus has an evergreen environment. It is one of the best campuses in Trichy. Our hostel food is very tasty and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, but core jobs are limited. CSE department has skilled faculty support.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure and facilities are good, and the campus has a green environment. Infrastructure like labs and library is fully equipped with air-conditioners. The hostel facilities are average and the food is better than average. Sports are conducted once a year.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend this college to students.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is well maintained. It has a Wi-Fi too. The food is also good and healthy for students.

reviews.review_heading: SRM TRP Engineering College is absolutely a good college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is amazing and the food also is very good. We have Wi-Fi in the hostel and Wi-Fi in the classroom. Labs are well-maintained properly. There is a hospital too for students. We have a big football ground, basketball ground, volleyball ground and a gym too.

reviews.review_heading: The campus life is good, but placement-wise, it's not much satisfying.
reviews.review_text: To be honest, no more Wi-Fi is provided for the hostel, for both boys' and girls' hostels. The classrooms are neat, clean, and sufficiently large in size. The food in the boys' hostel is very good and hygienic. Non-veg is provided twice a week. There are playing grounds for hostel students, and all the facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: For students who do not have financial barriers, IST is preferable.
reviews.review_text: SRM TRP Engineering College provides two hostels, IST and TRP. The IST hostel stands out for its superior facilities and better living standards, making it the preferred choice among students. However, it comes with a higher price tag, which might not be affordable for everyone. The TRP hostel is budget-friendly and comparatively less equipped but still provides the essentials for a comfortable stay. Both hostels ensure a disciplined environment and cater to students' academic needs by maintaini...

reviews.review_heading: Really good placements and infrastructure are available for our course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at TRP University was good and available for our course. All the facilities available for our course were of good quality. Wi-Fi, labs, libraries, canteens, classrooms, etc. were available for the college students. Hostel facilities were also good and available for the students.

reviews.review_heading: SRM TRP Engineering College is absolutely the best college.
reviews.review_text: This college has good infrastructure. Multiple classrooms with projector facilities are also available in this college. A well-maintained library is also available in this college. The college hostels are well maintained and cleaned daily. The college mess food is good, but the canteen food is average.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review about SRM TRP Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: They have great laboratory facilities and great faculty members. They provide a good Wi-Fi connection and also have a big library with books and e-books. They have a great hostel facility with neat and clean rooms and bathrooms. Their food tastes very good and provides quality food.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure and placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Wi-Fi is available 24X7 on campus. Hostel facilities are average. Medical facilities are good. Hostel food quality is good. Mess and rooms are clean and healthy. Sports grounds are good. Heaters are available in hostels for both bathing and drinking. Our college offers value-added courses and provides digital libraries.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college to study.
reviews.review_text: Our campus has the best infrastructure and is NBA accredited based on infrastructure. Our college is located in Irungalur, and now, due to the best infrastructure, its name has been changed to SRM Nagar. Our campus has a pleasant atmosphere.

reviews.review_heading: TRP Engineering College is one of the top 5 engineering colleges in our zone.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, indoor sports, outdoor sports ground, canteen, big auditorium, beautiful garden, etc. are available. All the facilities and infrastructure are available in my college. The quality of facilities in my hostel is good. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is nice. Medical facilities, and sports and games are good.

reviews.review_heading: Good for placements and industrial visits.
reviews.review_text: In our college, there are additional lab sessions, such as virtual reality and circuit labs. Because practical experience is always better than theoretical knowledge, lab sessions are much more engaging than regular classes. SRM TRP is excellent and better for engineering learning.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is a good college and they should expect more freedom.
reviews.review_text: Everything was good on campus rather than Wi-Fi, hostel food, and canteen facilities. We had well-developed lab facilities. Our campus was big but our college was average in size. We had medical facilities and sports facilities but sports facilities had to be improved.

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the Corporate Institute of Science and Technology:

faqs.answer: A:    The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.
faqs.question: What is the average BTech Computer Science Engineering salary in India?

faqs.answer: A:    The salary for an entry-level job is INR 30,000 to 45,000 and above per month. ECE graduates earn well after gathering experience for one-two year. Moreover, professionals with industrial experience stand out in terms of skills and can earn INR 8-12 Lacs per annum. To get good salary, ECE graduates should have a clear concept of designing, Analog circuit, VLSI, Microprocessors, Antennas, Network Analysis, and Programming.

review_content.Placements: 60 percent students get placed. The lowest package offered in this college is 1.8 LPA and the highest is 8.5 LPA. Placement is not very good for weak students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is very good as compared to other colleges. There is no Wi-Fi in the college. Wi-Fi facilities are only available in labs and only for faculty members and staff. Hostel provides us good facilities. Mess food is also not that bad, it's manageable but sports facilities are very poor.

review_content.Placements: The information about our batch in B.Tech mechanical engineering, there are 80 students in one class. The highest package in computer Science engineering is 8 LPA and the lowest package is up to 4 LPA. The student takes an internship out from college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is not bad, it is well. The Wi-Fi facilities are available and the classroom is smart. Have a good day.

overview_faqs.question: What is the scope of MBA?
overview_faqs.answer: The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.Some job profiles are listed here:Brand ManagerAccount ManagerInternational Business ManagerMarketing Execut

overview_faqs.question: What is the average BTech Computer Science Engineering salary in India?
overview_faqs.answer: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

overview_faqs.question: What is the starting salary of an ECE engineer?
overview_faqs.answer: The salary for an entry-level job is INR 30,000 to 45,000 and above per month. ECE graduates earn well after gathering experience for one-two year. Moreover, professionals with industrial experience stand out in terms of skills and can earn INR 8-12 Lacs per annum. To get good salary, ECE graduates should have a clear concept of designing, Analog circuit, VLSI, Microprocessors, Antennas, Network Analysis, and Programming.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Build the concept with quality education and training based on practical things.

content.Placements: Everything is good at this college; having experienced all aspects, I can say that companies like Cognizant, Wipro, TCS, etc., come here. The highest package is approximately 6.5 lakhs per annum and is totally based on your skills. All departments are available, and I have chosen the AI & ML branch.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are equipped with all the necessary facilities and are well-ventilated and digitally facilitated. You need not worry about any aspect of the campus infrastructure, as water purifiers and coolers are installed on every floor.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied because of faculty members and good placements in 2019 and previous years.

content.Placements: In our college, almost 40% of students were placed. The highest salary package offered was 30 LPA and the lowest salary package offered was 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Wipro, Intel, Jio, and 50 other companies that visited our campus. Top roles offered were data analyst, data scientist, and programmer.
content.Infrastructure: Our facilities and infrastructure were excellent and outstanding. There were labs, classrooms, and a good library. In our college, a hostel was available. The quality of food served in the mess and canteen was good. Medical facilities sports and games were available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The positive point for the college is its infrastructure.

content.Placements: 60 percent students get placed. The lowest package offered in this college is 1.8 LPA and the highest is 8.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Infosys, HCL Technologies, Wipro, Syntel, etc. The internship score is 70%. You get placed as a manager, software engineer, etc. in companies. Placement is not very good for weak students.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is very good as compared to other colleges. There is no Wi-Fi in the college. Wi-Fi facilities are only available in labs and only for faculty members and staff. Hostel provides us good facilities. Mess food is also not that bad, it's manageable but sports facilities are very poor.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: My personal experience is that if you do engineering try to take admission in government.

content.Placements: The information about our batch in B.Tech mechanical engineering, there are 80 students in one class. The highest package in computer Science engineering is 8 LPA and the lowest package is up to 4 LPA. The student takes an internship out from college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is not bad, it is well. The Wi-Fi facilities are available and the classroom is smart. In the hostel some facilities are good but not all facilities are good. Medical facilities are not available and the quality of food is also not good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college has nice faculty members.

content.Placements: Around 70% got placed. The highest salary package is 20 LPA, the lowest salary package is 3 LPA and the average salary package is 10 to 14 LPA. TCS, Zebronics, and other software companies come for placement. Students are provided skills like Java, python, c++, etc., and English communication skills.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good with Wi-Fi but not in working condition. Classrooms are too cleaned. Labs are available. Library has all the editions with good facilities.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very helpful, qualified, and knowledgeable. The teaching quality is too good. There are industrial visits. Semester exams are good, not difficult. The pass percentage is 28 marks.

Top recruiters are Wipro, Infosys, Amazon, Flipkart, Godrej, Tata group, etc. The highest placement of my college is 15 LPA and the average is 2.5 LPA and it is also based on profiles of companies and job roles. More than 50-60 percent of students are getting placed and the remaining students don't want placement. My plans is to get placed in private banks.
review_content.Infrastructure: Every month at the college organizes some functions, fests, orientations, seminars, DJs, concerts, and all every month they are doing any new things. The library has two and a half floors and offers books on every subject, fiction, stories, and books from all over. More than 2000 books are available in the library; if students want any book, they can borrow it for some days. The development ashram includes some college-run social groups. And help the needy people's distribution of food to educate the students to help the person. All the sports are viral in college with coaches; if the student wants to play at a state or national level, they help to reach the level.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Very good teacher behavior.

review_content.Placements: The institute has a placement cell that ensures good jobs and placements for students in various well-established companies. The top recruiters of the institute are Dell, Infosys, TCS, Apollo Tyres, Genpact, etc. Laxmipati Group of Institutions, Bhopal, is a private institute established in 2007. It is affiliated with Rajiv Gandhi Proudyogiki Vishwavidyalaya (RGPV), Bhopal, and has been approved by AICTE.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college organizes a tech fest every year, along with sports competitions and other festivals. College seniors also run various groups, such as cultural groups and student counseling groups. The fee structure for students is not well organized, as it costs a lot of money for B.Tech courses. However, the curriculum of the course is not that deserving; in my class, I paid 85,000 a year plus miscellaneous charges.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: My Engineering Journey at My College

review_content.Placements: During your Masters post-internship, we are eligible for campus placement and even eligible for a PPO from the company. More than 100 companies visited. The highest package was above 10 LPA. 90% of students get easily placed, and the average package is around 4 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Campus life is great, and we had different cells for the same. The college used to host sports meets and cultural fests where people used to showcase their talent. The classrooms were well-equipped with both practical and theoretical environments. Hostels are nearby the institute. Medical facilities are also available during the academic period.

answer.text: Laxmipati Institute Of Science & Technology, Bhopal has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed 10+2 or equivalent with Physics, Maths & Chemistry/ Biotech./ Biology/ Tech. Voc. subject/ Comp. Sc./ IT/ Informatics Practices/ Agriculture/ Engineering Graphics/ Business studies as optional subjects with the above-mentioned aggregate percentage (40% for SC/ST/OBC candidates (except Creamy layer) candidates belonging to Madhya Pradesh) in subjects taken together. Candidates passed 10+2 with grading system, must have grades equi. to mentioned aggregate %. Candidates who had passed 10+2 with grace marks in any subject can also apply provided they have scored mentioned aggregate % excluding grace marks. Result awaited student are also eligible on provisional basis. OR Candidate who have passed Diploma in Engg. & Tech. examination with at least 45% masks (40% marks in case of candidates belonging to SC/ST/OBC (excluding creamy layer) category of Madhya Pradesh) Subject to vacancies in the First Year, in case the vacancies at lateral entry are exhausted.After 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed 10th class examination/SSC examination or equivalent examination from any recognised board/center (10+2) system.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Graduation with mentioned percentage in aggregate of any UGC/AICTE approved Indian University or from a foreign University recognised by AIU or Institute recognised by the concerned University as equivalent thereto. The mentioned SC/ST percentage is for Madhya Pradesh residents. Candidates belonging to OBC (excluding creamy layer) categories of Madhya Pradesh can apply with at least 45%. The Bachelor's degree must be of minimum three years duration after passing Higher Secondary (10+2) examination of (10+2) system or equivalent. Candidates in the Final year of above degree examinations can also apply on provisional basis. Candidate who has passed qualifying examination with grace marks are also eligible for admission. Candidates whose qualifying examination marksheet are based on grading system has to produce conversion of grade to marks.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Placements are not sufficient for students.

content.Placements: Our college provided some job placements in the previous year. This year, we expect more of the same. But in my perspective, there will be a lot more career prospects for students. The training and placements cell organises a wide range of exercises, self-detraction roles, acting group debates, and simple writing for the pupils. The salary package offered is around 2.5 LPA - 3.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels have top-notch amenities including Wi-Fi access for students and college faculty members, systems, 24/7 water, and electricity. There is a bed for everyone. Meals are of good quality for their amount. We must be registered and pay the college accommodation fee. There are rented rooms. Some students live near the college on rent. Hostel facilities for both boys and girls are available on the college campus. Transport facilities are provided by the college management. A cafe and a big indoor table tennis arena are hidden by its star exterior.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: My journey at Laxmipati Institute Of Science & Technology,Bhopal.

content.Placements: At the third year, I will be eligible for the placements. There are many companies that come into the college, like HUL, TATA, Axis Bank, etc., and in reality, in my B.Com. course, I never heard that they placed any students. They provide good placements in college. They placed students who had master's degree, ITI, etc. The average package that I heard from them is approximately 10 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: There are many festivals that we celebrate, like the freshers party, 15th august, annual function, cultural festival, teachers day etc. There are many sports activities they provide like cricket, hockey, basketball, etc. In Barkatullah University, students lives are good but not very good and not bad either. If you want enjoyment, don't join the college.
