reviews.review_heading: Placements are not sufficient for students.
reviews.review_text: Hostels have top-notch amenities including Wi-Fi access for students and college faculty members, systems, 24/7 water, and electricity. There is a bed for everyone. Meals are of good quality for their amount. We must be registered and pay the college accommodation fee. There are rented rooms. Some students live near the college on rent. Hostel facilities for both boys and girls are available on the college campus. Transport facilities are provided by the college management. A cafe and a big indo...

reviews.review_heading: My journey at Laxmipati Institute Of Science & Technology,Bhopal.
reviews.review_text: There are many festivals that we celebrate, like the freshers party, 15th august, annual function, cultural festival, teachers day etc. There are many sports activities they provide like cricket, hockey, basketball, etc. In Barkatullah University, students lives are good but not very good and not bad either. If you want enjoyment, don't join the college.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and development.
reviews.review_text: Every month at the college organizes some functions, fests, orientations, seminars, DJs, concerts, and all every month they are doing any new things. The library has two and a half floors and offers books on every subject, fiction, stories, and books from all over. More than 2000 books are available in the library; if students want any book, they can borrow it for some days. The development ashram includes some college-run social groups. And help the needy people's distribution of food to educat...

reviews.review_heading: Very good teacher behavior.
reviews.review_text: The college organizes a tech fest every year, along with sports competitions and other festivals. College seniors also run various groups, such as cultural groups and student counseling groups. The fee structure for students is not well organized, as it costs a lot of money for B.Tech courses. However, the curriculum of the course is not that deserving; in my class, I paid 85,000 a year plus miscellaneous charges.

reviews.review_heading: My Engineering Journey at My College
reviews.review_text: Campus life is great, and we had different cells for the same. The college used to host sports meets and cultural fests where people used to showcase their talent. The classrooms were well-equipped with both practical and theoretical environments. Hostels are nearby the institute. Medical facilities are also available during the academic period.

reviews.review_heading: My honest opinion on Laxmipati Institute.
reviews.review_text: The name of the annual function is Samrat Utsav, which takes place in both winter and summer seasons. There are many performances given by students, and they show their art and skills. In this college, there is a sports complex for badminton, table tennis, chess, ludo, carrom, and outdoor games like volleyball, football, and cricket.

table.details: KSR Kalvi Nagar, Tiruchengode, Namakkal Dist, Tamil Nadu
K.S. Rangasamy College of Arts and Science

college_info.intro: The flagship programme offered at K.S. Rangasamy College of Arts and Science is an MBA. The college provides this programme to students at the PG level. Apart from the MBA course, the college also offers BA, BCA, BCom, BSc, and BBA courses at the UG level. The college offers an MBA programme for a duration of 2 years with a comprehensive curriculum. K.S. Rangasamy College of Arts and Science courses strive to enhance the learning experience of students to prepare them for the industry. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at K.S. Rangasamy College of Arts and Science in the table provided below:

placements.overview: The placement cell of the K.S. Rangasamy College of Arts and Science is committed to providing students with training and professional opportunities throughout their academic careers. The placement cell maintains contact with various industry sources, organises on-campus training and recruitment and informs the students about placement opportunities. K.S. Rangasamy College of Arts and Science offers 100% placement assistance. The highest and lowest packages offered during KSRCAS placements 2024 were INR 7 LPA and INR 1.8 LPA. Top companies visit K.S. Rangasamy College of Arts and Science placements such as Infosys, ITC Infotech, Capgemini, Wipro, HP, and Cognizant, among others. The key highlights of K.S. Rangasamy College of Arts and Science placements 2024 are tabulated below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: K.S. Rangasamy College of Arts and Science offers undergraduate courses including BA, BCA, BCom, BSc, and BBA. At the postgraduate level, the college provides a two-year regular MA, MSc, and MBA programme for students. The college offers an MBA in many specialisations, including Marketing, Finance, Human Resource Management and others. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by K.S. Rangasamy College of Arts and Science and their respective eligibility and fees:

faqs.answer: A:    The MBA fee at K.S. Rangasamy College of Arts and Science comprises multiple components, such as tuition fees, hostel fees, mess and other security deposits, etc. The MBA tuition fee at K.S. Rangasamy College of Arts and Science is INR 50 K. The mentioned fee is sourced from the official website of the institute/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative. Selected candidates must submit the first instalment of the MBA fee after the counselling and document verification process.
faqs.question: What is the fee for MBA at K.S. Rangasamy College of Arts and Science?

faqs.answer: A:    The qualification requirement varies course-wise at K.S. Rangasamy College of Arts and Science. Candidates must fulfil the requirement specific to their course. Below is the eligibility criteria for some of the courses offered by the college:CourseCommon EligibilityBScHigher Secondary with relevant subjectBCAHigher Secondary Examination with Mathematics or Business Mathematics or Computer Science Statistics (Academic stream or Vocational stream) as one of the subjectMBABachelor's degree with at least 50% aggregateBComHigher Secondary Examinations conducted by the Government of Tamil Nadu with Mathematics or Business Mathematics or Computer Science or Statistics or Business statistics as one of the subjectsMABA in relevant subject or bachelor's degree examination of Periyar University or any other university recognised by syndicate or equivalent theretoBBAHigher secondary examination (20% reserved for vocational stream) conducted by the government of Tamilnadu or any examination accepted as equivalent thereto by the syndicate
faqs.question: What is the qualification required to apply for various courses at K.S. Rangasamy College of Arts and Science?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, candidates who have passed Higher Secondary with relevant subject can apply for K.S. Rangasamy College of Arts and Science BSc programme. The subject requirement varies with the specialisation selected by the candidate. One must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.
faqs.question: Can I apply for B.Sc at K.S. Rangasamy College of Arts and Science after passing Class 12?

faqs.answer: A:    Any candidate who has passed BA English or any other bachelor's degree examination of Periyar university or any other university recognised by syndicate as equivalent thereto can apply for MA English at K.S. Aspirants shall be required to have to obtain a minimum of 40% in UG degree.

faqs.answer: K.S. Rangasamy College of Arts and Science admissions are merit-based. The college considers the merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam for admission. The application forms of the aspirants are evaluated to confirm their eligibility. Candidates who are selected are informed via email or SMS. Selected aspirants then need to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the college.
faqs.question: Q: How can I get admission at K.S. Rangasamy College of Arts and Science?

faqs.answer: Established in 1994, K.S. Rangasamy College of Arts and Science (KSRCAS), Namakkal, Tamil Nadu, is an autonomous institute. The institute is affiliated with Periyar University, Salem, and is recognised by AICTE. NAAC has accredited the institute with a grade of 'A'. The K.S. Rangasamy College of Arts and Science fees varies by course and are menioned below:MBA: The total tuition fee for the two-year MBA programme is INR 50 K. BCom: The tuition fee for the three-year BCom programme is INR 25 K. BSc: The tuition fee for the three-year BSc programme is INR 25 K.The mentioned fee is sourced from the official website of the institute/ sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.
faqs.question: Q: How costly is studying at K.S. Rangasamy College of Arts and Science?

faqs.answer: K.S. Rangasamy College of Arts and Science accepts CBSE 12th and ISC+1 scores for admission to the BCom programme. The eligibility criteria for admission to BCom at K.S. Rangasamy College of Arts and Science are as follows:Applicants must have completed 10+2 from a recognised boardApplicants must have a minimum of 50% marksApplicants must register on the Samarth PortalApplicants will be selected for admission through merit-based counseling
faqs.question: Q: What entrance exam scores does K.S. Rangasamy College of Arts and Science accept for admission to B.Com?

courses_data.name: K.S. Rangasamy College of Arts and Science MA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: K.S. Rangasamy College of Arts and Science offers a two-year MA programme divided into four semesters. The course is offered at the  PG level in two specialisations such asEnglishandTamil. Candidates who have completed graduation from a recognised university can apply for the MA course.

faqs.question: What are the M.A specialisations offered at K.S. Rangasamy College of Arts and Science?
faqs.answer: K.S. Rangasamy College of Arts and Science offers a two-year MA programme at the PG level. The course is spread across four semesters and is available in below two specialisations:EnglishTamil

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for M.A English course at K.S. Rangasamy College of Arts and Science?
faqs.answer: Any candidate who has passed BA English or any other bachelor's degree examination of Periyar university or any other university recognised by syndicate as equivalent thereto can apply for MA English at K.S. Rangasamy College of Arts and Science. Candidates with other bachelor's degree must possess a minimum of 50% in part-II English. Aspirants shall be required to have to obtain a minimum of 40% in UG degree.

faqs.question: How do I get admission in M.A at K.S. Rangasamy College of Arts and Science?
faqs.answer: K.S. Rangasamy College of Arts and Science admission to MA programme is based on merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam. Candidates need to complete BA in relevant subject or bachelor's degree examination of Periyar University or any other university recognised by syndicate or equivalent thereto for admission in MA course.

faqs.question: Can I get admission at K.S. Rangasamy College of Arts and Science with 60% in Class 12?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to complete a minimum of Class 12 to apply for a UG programme at K.S. Rangasamy College of Arts and Science. The college has not specified the minimum aggregate to apply for the UG course. However,  60% is a decent score in Class 12 and aspirants can apply with this score for admission.

faqs.question: Are admissions to various courses open at K.S. Rangasamy College of Arts and Science?
faqs.answer: Yes, K.S. Rangasamy College of Arts and Science admissions are currently open. Candidates can fill out the application form on the official website of the college or obtain the same from the campus. Admission to UG and PG programmes offered at K.S. Rangasamy College of Arts and Science is based on merit of the candidates in the last qualifying exam.

faqs.question: Do I need to appear in any entrance exam for admission to K.S. Rangasamy College of Arts and Science?
faqs.answer: K.S. Rangasamy College of Arts and Science offers admission in UG and PG courses based on merit of the candidates in the last qualifying exam. Hence, entrance exam is not mandatory for admission in the college. Aspirants with any entrance exam score can apply for admission provided they fulfil the eligibility requirement specific to their course.

faqs.question: How can I get admission at K.S. Rangasamy College of Arts and Science?
faqs.answer: K.S. Rangasamy College of Arts and Science admissions are merit-based. The college considers the merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam for admission. The application forms of the aspirants are evaluated to confirm their eligibility. Candidates who are selected are informed via email or SMS. Selected aspirants then need to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the college.

highlights.description: Consistently recognised by numerous national ranking agencies, K.S. Rangasamy College of Arts and Science is one of India’s top institutes. Recently, the institute ranked #169 in the India Today 2025 under the B.A. category, #243 under B.Com., #205 under B.Sc., and #154 under BCA. The reasons for its high ranks among numerous ranking agencies include its academic reputation, top-notch faculty, and well-laid infrastructure. reviews.review_heading: The college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is awesome. The college has good lab facilities, with more than 30 systems in each lab. It has at least 4 to 5 labs and smart classrooms to improve smart education. The college also has a green infrastructure.

college_info.college_name: K.S. Rangasamy College of Arts and Science

data.description: K.S. Rangasamy College of Arts and Science boasts an experienced faculty composed of PhD holders and individuals with higher degrees. The faculty are experienced with several years of teaching experience. KSRCAS also invites guest faculty for guest lectures and offers the opportunity for students to interact with some of the best personalities.  They are well trained professionals in their academics, governance, research and consultancy. The faculty are specialised in their own area of expertise.
